description.en: What is the meaning of to be? All answers hidden in the tower? You’re here to win, and you will be The One who holds the freaking power.

description.en: Meet the "Last Defender" miner, the only device capable of mining crypto as fiercely as the Romans defended against barbarians—except this machine won't fall to Goths, just to occasional software updates. It's so powerful, it could have mined enough Bitcoin to bribe Attila himself!

description.en: This ancient power has been gathered from The Big Bang, which created our Universe. Unconquerable, immense, and unrivaled when it comes to mining! Four Elements united to bring it to you!
